languages.text: "Выражение вашего лица и без того бесценно, а теперь станет еще лучше. Вы сами мне ее сказали".

traits.locale_text: "Выражение вашего лица и без того бесценно, а теперь станет еще лучше. Вы сами мне ее сказали".

languages.text: "The look on your face is priceless as it is, but now it is about to get even better. You told me the code phrase yourself."
languages.original_text: "Выражение вашего лица и без того бесценно, а теперь станет еще лучше. Вы сами мне ее сказали".

traits.locale_text: "The look on your face is priceless as it is, but now it is about to get even better. You told me the code phrase yourself."
"The look on your face is priceless as it is, but now it is about to get even better. You told me the code phrase yourself."
"The look on your face is priceless as it is, but now it is about to get even better. You told me the code phrase yourself."

languages.text: “你这表情已经够精彩了，不过接下来还会更精彩。那句暗语可是你自己告诉我的。”
languages.original_text: "The look on your face is priceless as it is, but now it is about to get even better. You told me the code phrase yourself."

traits.locale_text: “你这表情已经够精彩了，不过接下来还会更精彩。那句暗语可是你自己告诉我的。”

languages.text: « Votre expression ahurie vaut déjà son pesant d'or, mais ce n'est encore qu'un début. Croyez-le ou non, c'est vous-même qui m'avez révélé la phrase codée. »
languages.original_text: "The look on your face is priceless as it is, but now it is about to get even better. You told me the code phrase yourself."

traits.locale_text: « Votre expression ahurie vaut déjà son pesant d'or, mais ce n'est encore qu'un début. Croyez-le ou non, c'est vous-même qui m'avez révélé la phrase codée. »

languages.text: "Yüzündeki ifade şu an bile muhteşem ama birazdan nasıl bir şeye evrileceğini çok merak ediyorum. Şifreyi bana kendin söylemiştin."
languages.original_text: "The look on your face is priceless as it is, but now it is about to get even better. You told me the code phrase yourself."

traits.locale_text: "Yüzündeki ifade şu an bile muhteşem ama birazdan nasıl bir şeye evrileceğini çok merak ediyorum. Şifreyi bana kendin söylemiştin."

languages.text: «Su expresión ahora mismo no tiene precio, pero va a mejorar aún más. Fue usted misma quien me dio el código».
languages.original_text: "The look on your face is priceless as it is, but now it is about to get even better. You told me the code phrase yourself."

traits.locale_text: «Su expresión ahora mismo no tiene precio, pero va a mejorar aún más. Fue usted misma quien me dio el código».

languages.text: "Euer Gesichtsausdruck ist jetzt schon unbezahlbar, aber gleich wird er noch besser. Ihr habt mir die Losung selbst verraten."
languages.original_text: "The look on your face is priceless as it is, but now it is about to get even better. You told me the code phrase yourself."

traits.locale_text: "Euer Gesichtsausdruck ist jetzt schon unbezahlbar, aber gleich wird er noch besser. Ihr habt mir die Losung selbst verraten."

languages.text: 「あなたの顔の表情はそのままでも価値があるけど、今さらに良くなるよ。あなたは自分で暗号語を教えてくれたんだ。」
languages.original_text: "The look on your face is priceless as it is, but now it is about to get even better. You told me the code phrase yourself."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたの顔の表情はそのままでも価値があるけど、今さらに良くなるよ。あなたは自分で暗号語を教えてくれたんだ。」
